name: ALOH-O
tagline: Fresh, build-your-own poke on Santa Rosa Ave
seoDescription: ALOH-O is a Santa Rosa poke and sushi spot serving build-your-own poke bowls, bento, sushi rolls, tempura, and boba — fast, fresh, and affordable since 2018.

contact.address: 2032 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95407

images.heroAlt: A build-your-own poke bowl from ALOH-O — tuna and salmon over rice with seaweed salad, edamame, and house sauces

sections.eyebrow: Santa Rosa Ave · Poke & Sushi · Est. 2018
sections.heading: Fresh poke, built exactly the way you like it
sections.subheading: Pick your base, your fish, your sauce — then pile on as many toppings as you want, no extra charge. Fast, fresh, and made to order on Santa Rosa Ave.

image.alt: A build-your-own poke bowl from ALOH-O — tuna and salmon over rice with seaweed salad, edamame, and house sauces

sections.heading: Healthy fast food, done right
sections.intro: ALOH-O was built on a simple idea: fast, easy, low-cost food no longer has to be bad for you.

items.title: Fresh, not sitting around
items.body: Fish and veggies are kept fresh and cut to order, so your bowl tastes like it was just made — because it was.

items.title: Pile on the toppings
items.body: Seaweed salad, avocado, edamame, crispy onions, tamago and more — add as many as you like at no extra charge.

items.title: In and out fast
items.body: Counter-service and made-to-order means a quick, generous meal whether you dine in or grab it to go.

sections.heading: Poke, sushi, and a whole lot more

items.title: Build-Your-Own Poke Bowls
items.description: Choose a base, a sauce, your protein, and unlimited toppings. Premium tuna and hamachi paired with seaweed salad, edamame, avocado, tamago, and crispy onions.

items.title: Signature Salmon Poke
items.description: Our most-recommended bowl — fresh salmon over warm rice, finished with house sauces and a generous spread of toppings.

items.title: Bento Combo Boxes
items.description: A full plate built around chicken teriyaki, chicken katsu, or tempura with rice and sides.

items.title: Sushi Rolls
items.description: California rolls and house rolls made fresh for dine-in or takeout.

items.title: Tempura & Sides
items.description: Shrimp tempura, vegetable tempura, vegetable gyoza, and seaweed salad.

items.title: Boba & Tea
items.description: Thai iced tea, milk tea, and bubble tea to round out the meal — plus macaroon ice cream sandwiches for dessert.

sections.heading: One price. All the toppings.
sections.body: Most poke spots nickel-and-dime every add-on. At ALOH-O, you build the bowl you actually want — and the toppings come with it.
points: Bases: warm rice, brown rice, or greens
Proteins: tuna, salmon, hamachi, and more
House sauces, from classic shoyu to spicy
As many toppings as you like — no upcharge

sections.heading: A Santa Rosa poke spot since 2018
body: ALOH-O opened on Santa Rosa Ave in 2018 with a simple belief: fast, easy, and affordable food doesn't have to be bad for you. The shop pairs the build-your-own freedom of a poke bar with the comfort of Japanese favorites like katsu, teriyaki, and tempura.

It's grown into a go-to for a quick, healthy, satisfying meal in Sonoma County — generous bowls, friendly counter service, and the kind of price that makes it an easy weeknight call. There's a second location in Petaluma for poke lovers across the county.
highlights: Generous portions at an honest price

items.quote: Everything was fresh — the fish and veggies were super fresh, and the toppings are more than generous.
Good-sized portion for the price. For what you get, it's definitely worth it.
Really nice job. Everything tasted great and an awesome value.

sections.heading: Hungry for poke?
sections.body: Find us at 2032 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa. Open daily 11am–9pm — call ahead or come build your bowl.

sections.heading: Build your bowl
sections.subheading: Poke, sushi, bento, tempura, and boba — fresh, customizable, and made to order.

items.title: Build-Your-Own Poke Bowl
items.description: Start with a base, pick a sauce and protein, then load on unlimited toppings — seaweed salad, edamame, avocado, tamago, crispy onions, and more.

items.title: Salmon Poke Bowl
items.description: Fresh salmon over warm rice with house sauces and a generous spread of toppings.

items.title: Spicy Tuna / Hamachi Bowl
items.description: Premium tuna or hamachi with your choice of sauce and toppings.

items.title: Veggie Bowl
items.description: A fresh, plant-forward bowl for the vegan and vegetarian crowd.

items.title: Chicken Katsu Bento
items.description: Crispy panko chicken katsu with rice and sides.

items.title: Shrimp & Vegetable Tempura
items.description: Lightly battered shrimp and seasonal vegetables, fried crisp.

items.title: Sushi Rolls
items.description: California rolls and house rolls, made fresh.

items.title: Vegetable Gyoza
items.description: Pan-fried dumplings — a perfect starter or side.

items.title: Seaweed Salad
items.description: A fresh, savory side or topping.

items.title: Milk Tea & Bubble Tea
items.description: Classic milk teas and flavored boba to finish the meal.

items.title: Macaroon Ice Cream Sandwiches
items.description: A sweet, handheld dessert to take on the go.

items.q: How does the build-your-own poke work?
items.a: Choose your base, a sauce, and your protein, then add as many toppings as you'd like — there's no extra charge for piling them on.

items.q: Do you have vegan or vegetarian options?
items.a: Yes — we offer veggie bowls and plenty of plant-based toppings and sides.
We do. ALOH-O is counter-service and built for quick takeout, plus dine-in seating.

sections.heading: Come build your bowl
sections.body: 2032 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa. Open daily 11am–9pm.

sections.heading: Fresh food that fits a busy day
sections.subheading: A Santa Rosa poke and sushi spot built on the idea that fast, affordable food doesn't have to be bad for you.

sections.heading: A Santa Rosa poke spot since 2018
body: ALOH-O opened on Santa Rosa Ave in 2018 with a simple belief: fast, easy, and affordable food doesn't have to be bad for you. The shop pairs the build-your-own freedom of a poke bar with the comfort of Japanese favorites like katsu, teriyaki, and tempura.

It's grown into a go-to for a quick, healthy, satisfying meal in Sonoma County — generous bowls, friendly counter service, and the kind of price that makes it an easy weeknight call. There's a second location in Petaluma for poke lovers across the county.
highlights: Generous portions at an honest price

sections.heading: Three steps to a better bowl
sections.intro: Ordering at ALOH-O is fast and totally yours to customize.

items.title: Pick your base & protein
items.body: Warm rice, brown rice, or greens — then tuna, salmon, hamachi, or a veggie option.

items.title: Choose your sauce
items.body: From classic shoyu to spicy, pick the flavor that suits you.

items.title: Load on the toppings
items.body: Seaweed salad, avocado, edamame, tamago, crispy onions and more — as many as you like, no upcharge.

sections.heading: Two locations, same fresh poke
sections.body: Find us on Santa Rosa Ave, or visit our Petaluma shop — both built around fresh, customizable bowls and quick, friendly service.

sections.heading: Visit ALOH-O
sections.blurb: Find us at 2032 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95407, or call (707) 303-7008. Open every day, 11am–9pm.
